summary: Comprehensive testing completed for DollarFlow USDC payment platform iteration 3, focusing on Family Vault transaction integration bug fixes. All CRITICAL BUG FIXES verified working: POST /api/family-vault/send/{member_id} correctly updates member and vault balances, POST /api/transactions auto-updates family member balances when recipient_name matches, frontend integration 100% functional with Send dialogs and balance updates. Backend API success rate 95.2%, frontend integration 100% working.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 401 when no auth headers provided
minor_bugs.impact: Auth middleware may be checking cookies when explicit headers are passed

verified_fixes.issue: FIXED: Family member balance updates when sending money via dedicated endpoint
verified_fixes.verification: ✅ VERIFIED: $25 send increased Maria's balance from $145.50 to $170.50, vault total increased from $469.75 to $494.75

verified_fixes.issue: FIXED: Auto-updates family member balance when recipient_name matches member
verified_fixes.verification: ✅ VERIFIED: $15 transaction to Carlos increased balance from $82.00 to $97.00 automatically

verified_fixes.issue: FIXED: Shows updated member balances after transactions
verified_fixes.verification: ✅ VERIFIED: GET requests consistently return updated balances after sends

verified_fixes.issue: FIXED: Send button opens dialog with amount input
verified_fixes.verification: ✅ VERIFIED: Send button opens dialog, accepts amount input, processes transaction

verified_fixes.issue: FIXED: Balances update on Family Vault page after sending
verified_fixes.verification: ✅ VERIFIED: Vault total updated from $294.75 to $319.75 after $25 send

verified_fixes.issue: FIXED: Send Money page loads family members as contacts
verified_fixes.verification: ✅ VERIFIED: 3 family member contacts loaded, selection works, uses /api/family-vault/send endpoint

verified_fixes.issue: FIXED: Dashboard balance decreases after sending money
verified_fixes.verification: ✅ VERIFIED: Balance decreased from $2500.00 to $2444.94 after transactions

passed_tests: ✅ CRITICAL: POST /api/family-vault/send/{member_id} endpoint working - member balance increases, vault total updates
✅ CRITICAL: POST /api/transactions with family member name auto-updates member balance
✅ CRITICAL: GET /api/family-vault shows updated balances consistently
✅ CRITICAL: Frontend Family Vault Send button opens dialog and processes transactions
✅ CRITICAL: Frontend Send Money page loads family members as contacts
✅ CRITICAL: Frontend balance updates reflect in both Family Vault and Dashboard
✅ Backend API testing: 20/21 tests passed (95.2% success rate)
✅ Public endpoints: 25 spots, 5 currencies, currency history working
✅ Protected endpoints: dashboard, transactions, family-vault, analytics working with auth
✅ Authentication system: session creation, protected routes return 401 without auth
✅ Family Vault page UI: loads correctly, displays member cards, vault summary
✅ Send Money page UI: amount input, contact selection, review flow working
✅ Dashboard UI: displays updated balance, shows recent transactions to family members
✅ Family member send dialog: opens, accepts input, confirms transaction
✅ Integration flow: Send Money → Family Member → Uses correct API endpoint
✅ Balance consistency: Dashboard reflects sent amounts, vault shows received amounts
action_item_for_main_agent: All Family Vault transaction integration bug fixes verified working. Only minor issue: /api/auth/me endpoint auth behavior could be clarified (returns 200 when expecting 401). This is low priority and doesn't affect functionality.
